content.title: Welcome to ABS Global
content.subtitle: Your Partner in ISO Certification & Compliance

content.title: Welcome to official Website Of ABS Global
content.description: At ABS Global, we specialize in providing internationally recognized certifications for management systems, helping organizations achieve excellence in quality, environmental management, occupational health and safety, and food safety.

content_ar.title: أهلا ومرحبا بكم فى الموقع الرسمى لـ ABS Global
content_ar.description: في شركة ABS Global، نحن متخصصون في توفير شهادات معترف بها دوليًا لأنظمة الإدارة، ومساعدة المؤسسات على تحقيق التميز في الجودة، والإدارة البيئية، والصحة والسلامة المهنية، وسلامة الغذاء.

content.title: Welcome to ABS Global
content.description: ABS Global specializes in providing internationally recognized certifications for management systems, helping organizations achieve excellence.

content_ar.title: أهلا ومرحبا بكم فى ABS Global
content_ar.description: تتخصص شركة ABS Global في تقديم شهادات معترف بها دوليًا لأنظمة الإدارة، مما يساعد المؤسسات على تحقيق التميز.

content.title: Company Overview
content.description: ABS Global is a leading certification body in Egypt and the Middle East, specializing in providing international Management System certifications (ISO). Headquartered in the heart of Cairo, we offer a comprehensive suite of accreditation and auditing services to a diverse portfolio of local and international clients. We are committed to empowering organizations across various sectors to achieve operational excellence and gain access to global markets. We fulfill this by implementing the highest international standards of quality and sustainability, fully accredited by EGAC and recognized by IAF.

content.title: Mission
content.description: At ABS Global, our mission is to deliver high-caliber accreditation services that add tangible value to our client's businesses. We strive to foster trust, integrity, and professionalism in everything we do, ensuring that organizations worldwide meet international standards while driving a culture of continuous improvement.

content.title: Accreditation and Registrations
content.description: ABS Global is officially accredited by the Egyptian National Accreditation Council (EGAC), ensuring the highest standards of credibility and technical competence across all our certification services. We take pride in being a registered and recognized entity by the International Accreditation Forum (IAF) and the Egyptian Organization for Standardization and Quality (EOS). This standing reflects our unwavering commitment to upholding global standards and international best practices, empowering our clients to compete effectively in global markets.

content.title: Our Commitment
content.description: At ABS Global, we are dedicated to excellence in every facet of our operations. Our team of highly experienced auditors and industry experts is committed to providing impartial, rigorous, and fair assessments. Our goal is to empower organizations to not only achieve but consistently maintain certifications to international standards, fostering a culture of long-term operational success.

content.title: Vision
content.description: Our vision is to be a globally recognized leader in certification services, empowering organizations to achieve sustainable success and excellence through the effective implementation of international management systems.

seo_meta.meta_title: About Us | ISO Certification & Quality Management Experts

content.title: Our Services
content.subtitle: ISO Certification & Consulting Services
content.description: At ABS Global, we offer a comprehensive range of management system certifications to help organizations demonstrate their commitment to excellence, sustainability, and continuous improvement. Our certification services are designed to add value to your business, enhance your reputation, and open doors to new opportunities in the global marketplace. Explore our certification offerings below:

content_ar.title: خدماتنا
content_ar.subtitle: خدمات الشهادات والاستشارات ISO
content_ar.description: تقدم شركة ABS Global مجموعة شاملة من خدمات الشهادات لأنظمة الإدارة لمساعدة المؤسسات على إظهار التزامها بالتميز والاستدامة والتحسين المستمر. تم تصميم خدمات الشهادات لدينا لإضافة قيمة إلى عملك وتعزيز سمعتك وفتح الأبواب أمام فرص جديدة في السوق العالمية. اكتشف عروض الشهادات لدينا أدناه:

items.title: Quality Management Systems
items.subtitle: ISO 9001:2015
items.description: ISO 9001:2015 is the internationally recognized standard for quality management systems. Achieving ISO 9001 certification demonstrates your organization's commitment to consistently providing products and services that meet customer and regulatory requirements, enhancing customer satisfaction, and driving continual improvement.

items.title: Environmental Management Systems
items.subtitle: ISO 14001:2015
items.description: ISO 14001:2015 is the internationally recognized standard for environmental management systems. Achieving ISO 14001 certification demonstrates your organization's commitment to environmental responsibility, reducing environmental impact, and achieving sustainable development.

items.title: Occupational Health and Safety Management Systems
items.subtitle: ISO 45001:2018
items.description: ISO 45001:2018 is the internationally recognized standard for occupational health and safety management systems. Achieving ISO 45001 certification demonstrates your organization's commitment to providing a safe and healthy workplace for employees, reducing workplace risks, and preventing work-related injuries and illnesses.

items.title: Food Safety Management Systems
items.subtitle: ISO 22000:2018
items.description: ISO 22000:2018 is the internationally recognized standard for food safety management systems. Achieving ISO 22000 certification demonstrates your organization's commitment to food safety, protecting consumers, and ensuring the safety of food products throughout the supply chain.

items.title: Food Safety
items.subtitle: HACCP
items.description: HACCP (Hazard Analysis and Critical Control Points) is a internationally recognized system for food safety management. Achieving HACCP certification demonstrates your organization's commitment to food safety, protecting consumers, and ensuring the safety of food products throughout the supply chain.

content.title: Our Blogs
content.subtitle: Latest Insights & Articles
content.description: Explore our latest articles on ISO certifications , compliance, and international standards. Stay updated with expert insights, best practices, and practical guidance to help your organization achieve operational excellence and meet global requirements.

items.title: What is ISO Certification?
items.description: Learn the fundamentals of ISO certifications, how they work, and why they are essential for ensuring quality, compliance, and credibility in today’s competitive global market.

items.title: Benefits of ISO 9001
items.description: Discover how ISO 9001 helps organizations enhance product quality, improve customer satisfaction, streamline operations, and build a strong reputation in the marketplace.

items.title: ISO 14001 Explained
items.description: Understand the importance of environmental management systems and how ISO 14001 helps organizations reduce environmental impact and achieve sustainability goals.

items.title: ISO 45001 for Workplace Safety
items.description: Learn how ISO 45001 improves occupational health and safety by minimizing risks, preventing workplace incidents, and ensuring a safer environment for employees.

items.title: ISO 22000 and Food Safety
items.description: Explore how ISO 22000 ensures food safety across the supply chain by identifying risks, improving processes, and protecting consumers from potential hazards.

items.title: Why ISO Certification Matters
items.description: Discover why ISO certification is a valuable investment that boosts credibility, opens new market opportunities, and helps organizations maintain consistent standards.

items.title: What is certification, and why is it important?
items.description: Certification is a process by which an independent third party verifies that an organization meets specific standards or requirements. It is important because it demonstrates an organization’s commitment to quality, safety, environmental responsibility, and continuous improvement, enhancing credibility, reputation, and market access.

items.title: Agriculture, Forestry, and Fishing
items.description: Certification in ISO 9001 ensures quality management systems are in place for agricultural operations, while ISO 14001 certification focuses on environmental management to minimize the ecological footprint. ISO 45001 certification ensures the safety and health of workers in these industries.

items.title: Food Products, Beverages, and Tobacco
items.description: ISO 22000 certification is crucial for ensuring food safety management systems in the processing of food products, beverages, and tobacco. ISO 9001 and ISO 14001 certifications further enhance quality management and environmental sustainability in these industries.
